proven.smt2:
; LINE: 133
; PRINCIPLE: P4 – Registry mutation soundness
; Claim: `signalRegistry.getGeneratorNames()` returns a (possibly empty) list
;        of generator names that have been registered by `buildSignalRegistry`.
;        The list length is therefore ≥ 0 and equals the number of successful
;        `registry.register(...)` calls inside `buildSignalRegistry`.

(declare-const registered Int)   ; number of generators added by buildSignalRegistry
(declare-const listed   Int)     ; length of the name list returned by getGeneratorNames()

; Code effect: each successful register increments `registered` by 1.
; For the purpose of this invariant we only need the relationship:
(assert (= listed registered))

; Negated claim: the logged list length differs from the number of registered generators
(assert (not (= listed registered)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat   → the log cannot mis‑report the number of generators.
